## Other Chaos Mercenaries

#### 0-2 Blessed Blades (Cost: 5 Glory for the pair, 2 Glory to replace one)

You cannot recruit only one Blessed Blade, and must instead recruit them in a pair unless replacing a single lost Blessed Blade.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Blessed Blade | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
Each Blessed Blade is equipped with Standard Armour and a Commune Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Commune Blade.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Attuned In Purpose.** Blessed Blades come in pairs. They are always in a FIRETEAM with each other. While they are both in close combat with the same enemy, they both have \+1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks against that enemy. If one of them is a casualty or is otherwise removed from your Warband, the other cannot be fielded until you recruit a replacement, which costs 2 Glory. They share Promotion Dice, and are promoted to Elite as if one model, taking only one Elite slot in your Warband. They earn XP together and learn skills together. They suffer Trauma and Battle Scars individually.  
* **Cut Them Down.** When an enemy in close combat with the Blessed Blade Retreats, the Blessed Blade has \+1 DICE to Hit and Injure for its free attack against that model.

**Keywords**  
CHAOS CULT, FIRETEAM

#### 0-1 Chaos Ogryn (Cost: 4 Glory)

A Vermintide Warband cannot recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Chaos Ogryn | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 40mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Chaos Ogryn is equipped with Standard Armour, its Daemon Claw, and a Two-Handed Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Daemon Claw.** Melee, \+2 INJURY DICE, HEAVY  
* **Two-Handed Blade.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Wall of Muscle.** All injury rolls made against the Chaos Ogryn have \-1 DICE.

**Upgrades**

* **Plague Ogryn (NURGLE Leader Only).** The Chaos Ogryn can be upgraded to a Plague Ogryn for free, replacing its Two-Handed Blade with a Plague Claw, and granting it the following abilities.  
  * **Plague Claw.** Melee, HEAVY, INFECTION MARKERS  
  * **Disgustingly Resilient.** The Plague Ogryn treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).  
  * **Inevitable.** The Plague Ogryn moves only half as far when Dashing (i.e. 3”).

**Keywords**  
LARGE, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STRONG, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Cultist Firebrand (Cost: 3 Glory)

A Vermintide Warband cannot recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Cultist Firebrand | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
Each Blessed Blade is equipped with Standard Armour, a Balefire Pike, and a Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Balefire Pike.** 12”, FLAMETHROWER, IGNORE ARMOUR, FIRE, the target must move D3” in the direction of your choice on a hit.  
* **Blade.** Melee, CRITICAL

**Abilities**

* **Fiery Faith.** The Cultist Firebrand’s allies within 6” have the NEGATE FEAR Keyword.

**Keywords**  
CHAOS CULT, NEGATE FEAR

#### 0-1 Fellgor Gorehorn (Cost: 3 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Fellgore Gorehorn | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Fellgor Gorehorn is equipped with Standard Armour, included in its statistics above, as well as an Autopistol and a Two-Handed Blade. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Autopistol.** 12”, ASSAULT  
* **Two-Handed Blade.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Frenzy.** When the Fellgore Gorehorn is taken Out of Action, before removing it from the table, it can make a single melee attack against an enemy it is in close combat with. BLOOD MARKERS cannot be spent on this attack's Success Roll.  
* **Headtaker.** Whenever the Fellgore Gorehorn takes an enemy Out of Action in melee, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from it.

**Keywords**  
BEASTMEN, LIMITED POTENTIAL, STRONG

#### 0-2 Mauler Hound (Cost: 2 Glory)

A Vermintide Warband cannot recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Mauler Hound | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Mauler Hound is equipped with its Bite. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bite.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Distraction.** The Mauler Hound’s owner has \+1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks against enemies that the Mauler Hound is in melee with.  
* **Fetch.** The Canid Officer can drag along any Down model within 1” when it moves, moving at half speed with the other model following directly behind it, both with normal movement or when dashing. If this takes that model out of melee combat, this does not trigger a free Fight Action.  
* **Hound’s Swiftness.** The Mauler Hound has \+1 DICE to all Dash and Jump Success Rolls  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Mauler Hound forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION

#### 0-1 Unbound Daemonhost (Cost: 5 Glory)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Daemonhost | 6”/Flying | N/A | N/A | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Unbound Daemonhost has the following Psychic Powers that provide it with attacks. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Energy Torrent (Attack).** 24”, \-1 DICE, IGNORE COVER, BLAST 2”, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Unholy Gaze (Attack).** 18”, \-1 DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Warp Grasp (Attack).** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY

**Abilities**

* **Daemonic Resistance.** Injuries rolled against the Unbound Daemonhost have \-1 DICE.  
* **Daemonic Speed.** The Unbound Daemonhost has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls.  
* **Re-Knit Host Form (PSYCHIC).** At the start of the Unbound Daemonhost’s Activation, remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from it.  
* **Warp Tunnel (PSYCHIC).** As an Action with a Risky Success Roll with \+1 DICE, the Unbound Daemonhost can teleport to any location within 6” of it.

**Keywords**  
DAEMON, FLYING, NO PROMOTION, PSYKER 2, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Unsanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory)

Outlaw Warbands can also take this Mercenary. A Vermintide Warband cannot recruit this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Unsanctioned Psyker | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Unsanctioned Psyker is equipped with a Force Weapon and a Laspistol. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Force Weapon.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, Additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword, PSYCHIC, HELD  
* **Laspistol.** 12”

**Abilities**

* **Power Unleashed.** The Unsanctioned Psyker has PERILOUS ±2 with all psychic powers.

When you recruit the Unsanctioned Psyker, choose one of the following disciplines. The Unsanctioned Psyker knows all of the powers listed below under that discipline.

* **Biomancy**  
  * **Bio Lightning (Attack).** 12”, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
  * **Endurance (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the chosen model.  
  * **Iron Arm (Effect).** No Range, Self, 1 Target, Next Activation, injury rolls against the caster have \-1 INJURY MODIFIER, stacking with armour up to \-3.  
* **Divination**  
  * **Foreboding (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, whenever an enemy attempts to Charge the target, the target can make either a ranged attack before that Charge, or a melee attack afterwards, against the Charging model in either case.  
  * **Precognition (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, End of Turn, all attacks against that model have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
  * **Prescience (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate, the target gains a BLESSING MARKER.  
* **Pyromancy**  
  * **Fire Shield (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, 1 Target, Immediate and End of Turn, each enemy in close combat with the target immediately suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER, and each time an enemy enters close combat with the target and after each time an enemy attacks it in melee, that enemy suffers 1 BLOOD MARKER. An enemy with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this power.  
  * **Spontaneous Combustion (Effect).** 12”, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target suffers 2 BLOOD MARKERS. A target with NEGATE FIRE is immune to this power.  
* **Technomancy**  
  * **Blessing of the Machine God (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, Target Activation, the target has \+1 INJURY DICE with one weapon of your choice.  
  * **Machine Flense (Attack).** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, \-1 INJURY DICE non-ARTIFICIAL, non-VEHICLE models, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
  * **Reforge (Effect).** 6”, Self or Ally, immediate, if the target has the ARTIFICIAL, MECHANICUS, or VEHICLE Keyword, or is a model with at least \-2 worth of Armour (besides shields), remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from it.  
* **Telekinesis**  
  * **Assail (Attack).** 12”, ASSAULT, \+1 INJURY MODIFIER, PSYCHIC, SHRAPNEL, RISKY  
  * **Shockwave (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 6”, Enemy and Ally, Each Target, Immediate, each target must roll on the Injury table, with \+1 INJURY DICE. This injury has IGNORE ARMOUR, NONLETHAL, and STUN MARKERS. The targets are then each pushed D3” directly away from the caster unless they are LARGE.  
  * **Telekine Dome (Effect).** No Range, Self, End of Turn, Injury rolls against the caster and each ally within 3” of it have \-1 DICE.  
* **Telepathy**  
  * **Psychic Shriek (Attack).** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
  * **Puppet Master (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target must move D6” in the direction of your choice. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. This power cannot be used while in close combat.  
  * **Terrify (Effect).** Melee, Enemy, 1 Target, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly away from the caster. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. A model that ignores the FEAR Keyword is immune.

**Keywords**  
PSYKER 2
